Sentiment - Intraday post (17/Nov)

Window of Risk update:

Window of Risk Pt. 2 - Flows update

(it closes with the OpEx)

Weekly post:

Sentiment has shaken - Weekly post (17-21/Nov)

Big investors are de‑risking AI/tech stocks. With the government shutdown ending and official economic data resuming, upcoming releases can cause rapid repricing. The NVDA and NFP events are the pivotal weekly events sentiment wise. What one should understand that this “shake” is coming from the big money, not from speculative trades. Posted about it publicly…

Let’s look at the intraday positioning…

INTRADAY POSTCoding today’s positioning:

Net speed profile is negative both locally and on a net basis, with centroid of 6772.01 - 6796.86 area.

The upside pivot is also in this zone at 6785.91, with an upside target of 6797.48 (margin of error is 6800). This is a very strong and serious resistance.

Downside pivot is at 6733.45with primal target of 6695, but main target of 6654.95 (I don’t see it coming, to be honest)

Market is most expected to hover around 6745, in the range of the upside target and primal downside target, coincidencing with the 95% upside level and downside risk level, due to the positive skewed distribution.If the distribution gets realized, that will mean that the market accepts this lower level, that if sentiment doesn’t change into positive direction, will pretty much foreshadow a deeper future correction.

VIX expo will be supportive into Wednesday, but volatility buyback after. And this one will have a relatively bigger impact.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
